summary: The diff correctly removes the 'Built by Caffeine AI' attribution from the Footer component. The file summary for Footer.tsx explicitly states 'the caffeine.ai attribution has been removed,' and the Footer.tsx content shown preserves all other footer elements (brand logo, quick links, contact info, copyright notice, and 'Made with love' tagline). The truncation cuts off the very end of the file but the visible content strongly supports full compliance with REQ-1.
